headline: Goldman says AI trade reversal pressures hedge fund returns
summary: Investing.com -- Hedge funds have suffered losses across long-short strategies as the artificial intelligence and momentum trade that has dominated much of 2026 reversed since June 22, according to Goldman Sachs' Prime desk.

headline: Jim Cramer on Goldman Sachs: “I Want You to Hold on to That”
summary: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE:GS) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money, as he highlighted the AI opportunities in neoclouds. When a caller inquired about the stock, Cramer remarked: I think that, at 17 times earnings, I know this sounds strange… But you know what? It may actually be just as cheap […]

headline: Goldman Sachs Sounds Alarm Over Fresh Threat to Global Oil Supplies
summary: Goldman Sachs has reversed its recent bearish oil outlook, warning that renewed disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz could delay Middle Eastern production recovery and tighten global crude supplies.

raw.headline: Goldman Sachs Sounds Alarm Over Fresh Threat to Global Oil Supplies

headline: Duke Energy (DUK) Following Goldman Move Is The Fair Value Story Still Intact
summary: Duke Energy (DUK) is back in focus after Goldman Sachs removed the stock from its US Conviction List while keeping a positive rating, prompting investors to reassess the utility giant’s role in portfolios. See our latest analysis for Duke Energy. Duke Energy’s latest share price of US$126.79 sits on top of a year-to-date share price return of 7.96%, while total shareholder return over 3 years has reached 54.07%. This suggests that momentum has been supported by its capital plans, dividend...
